title: Watched the show where do I go from here
display_title: Watched the show where do I go from here
wikitext:
[]: Watched the show, where do I go from here? Post by Protoboy » Mon Jan 14, 2013 6:37 pm Hey there everyone! I'm new here, so I decided this would be a less-formal thread to post this here. I just got done watching the original 26-episode series of Neon Genesis Evangelion. What I want to know is what I should watch from here? I heard the Death and Rebirth movies are just recaps of what happened in the show, Death being more-so a compressed recap and Rebirth having new footage. If I watch the directors cuts of episodes 21-24 will I get the same information that was in Rebirth? That's what I'm confused on. If so, does that mean after I watch those episodes I can move on to The End of Evangelion seemlessly, or should I watch Rebirth as a whole? Just a little confused is all. Thank you!

[]: Post by MAGI_01 » Mon Jan 14, 2013 6:44 pm Hello there! Welcome! I would watch the directors cuts of episodes 21-24 and then go on to EoE. That is what I did because seeing as Death and Rebirth is a recap it's really not needed because I don't think any new information is presented in it. (someone correct me if I'm wrong)

[]: Post by bobbyfischer's ghost » Mon Jan 14, 2013 6:44 pm Watch the series including the DC episodes and then watch EoE. just skip Death and Rebirth.

[]: Post by TehDonutKing » Mon Jan 14, 2013 6:51 pm Actually, Death has a scene that's about five seconds of new footage, iirc.

[]: Post by Practice » Mon Jan 14, 2013 7:02 pm After EoE there's two Rebuild films out (out of four). The third Rebuild film was just released in Japan not too long ago, but there is a subtitled camrip available.

[]: Post by Protoboy » Mon Jan 14, 2013 7:04 pm Wow, that was a timely response, haha. Thank you, everyone! Yeah, my mind is still swimming. My friend let me borrow his 8-disc ADV set and I've been blown away from it all. Before I look up any information or start asking plot questions, I want to watch the movies and any other pertinent canon. (besides probably the mangas) TehDonutKing, that extra 5 seconds, I'm guessing it's rather inconsequential compared to the whole plot? (keeping my fingers crossed, haha)

[]: Post by pwhodges » Mon Jan 14, 2013 7:30 pm There were a number of new bits in Death, but almost all ended up in the Director's Cut episodes.

[]: Post by TehDonutKing » Mon Jan 14, 2013 8:06 pm Those five seconds cause EoE to make a hell of a lot more sense.

[]: Post by A.T. Fish » Mon Jan 14, 2013 8:33 pm You can go back and watch the director's cut and then skip Death, but in my opinion it's worth to watch it at least once, for the sake of completion (plus the music is good), then you can watch EoE, freak out (mandatory) and move on to Rebuild.

[]: Post by riffraff11235 » Mon Jan 14, 2013 8:39 pm A.T. Fish wrote: You can go back and watch the director's cut and then skip Death, but in my opinion it's worth to watch it at least once, for the sake of completion (plus the music is good), then you can watch EoE, freak out (mandatory) and move on to Rebuild.

[]: Post by TehDonutKing » Mon Jan 14, 2013 9:03 pm Someone please correct me if i'm wrong, but isn't Death the only part of the series that shows SPOILER: Show

[]: Post by riffraff11235 » Mon Jan 14, 2013 9:11 pm TehDonutKing wrote: SPOILER: Show

[]: Post by Nuclear Lunchbox » Mon Jan 14, 2013 9:27 pm I'm just mirroring everybody else, but you should go on to watch the DCs of episodes 21-24, watch Death & Rebirth, and then go on to watch EoE. Then you should come back here, pour out your mindfuckery, let us soak it up, and then watch the Rebuild series and let it happen all over again.

[]: Post by riffraff11235 » Mon Jan 14, 2013 9:30 pm Ah, this should be interesting. People usually don't register on EGF having only finished the series and nothing else. I eagerly await your reaction to End of Evangelion and Rebuild, Protoboy!

[]: Post by Nuclear Lunchbox » Mon Jan 14, 2013 9:31 pm Proto, make sure that you avoid any and all EoE spoilers. They will ruin your life forever, should you hear them before watching the movie. SPOILER: Show

[]: Post by MAGI_01 » Mon Jan 14, 2013 9:42 pm riffraff11235 wrote: Ah, this should be interesting. People usually don't register on EGF having only finished the series and nothing else. I eagerly await your reaction to End of Evangelion and Rebuild, Protoboy!

[]: Post by slothen » Mon Jan 14, 2013 10:32 pm riffraff11235 wrote: Yeah, that's correct. Death is the only place we see an actual image of it.

[]: Post by Agentomega » Mon Jan 14, 2013 11:33 pm Nuclear Lunchbox wrote: SPOILER: Show

[]: Post by Nuclear Lunchbox » Tue Jan 15, 2013 4:23 pm Agentomega wrote: You, sir, are amazing.

[]: Post by Lance of LoL » Tue Jan 15, 2013 8:16 pm There is only one place you can possibly go from here. KAAANEEEDAAA!!!!!!
